Attempting to inline `v` when it's an increment/decrement operation.

Regression test for issue #75200.

-- go.mod --
module example.com/a
go 1.18

-- c/c.go --
package c

import "fmt"

func _() {
    v := 13
    v++ //@nocodeaction("v", "refactor.inline.variable")
    v-- //@nocodeaction("v", "refactor.inline.variable")
    fmt.Println(v)
}
